question: What value is displayed on the yellow score counter when the Lego minifigure wearing a white shirt with a black graphic design stands in the foreground? A. 1.362.890 B. 1.364.010 C. 1.363.760 D. 1.364.260
How many red heart icons are visible in the health indicator when the Lego minifigure in the light blue uniform stands on the white octagonal platform?
What color is the uniform worn by the police minifigure visible in most scenes?
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A LEGO police officer and a green translucent figure stand on a white circular platform. The background features a large red and white striped circus tent with a clown face entrance emitting fire. A wooden park bench sits on the paved area to the right of the platform. A circular mini-map is visible in the bottom-left corner. Text overlays including 'GAMMEPLAY' appear in the top-right corner.

question: Which of the previously seen entities is back on screen? A. <Lego minifigure with black hair, wearing a white shirt with a black graphic design> B. <Lego minifigure wearing a light blue uniform with a matching cap> C. <Wooden park bench with black metal legs> D. <Lego minifigure wearing a green hooded cloak with a brown belt>

Did the video display BOTH a circus tent entrance emitting fire AND a wooden bench tilted at a steep angle? A. Only the fire-emitting tent was displayed B. Only the tilted bench was displayed C. Both the fire-emitting tent and tilted bench were displayed D. Neither was displayed
Where is the text 'GAMMEPLAY' displayed on the screen?
Where is the wooden park bench located relative to the circular platform?
Describe the sequence of character actions and interface changes visible throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a yellow explosion appears between the officer and ghost; at 8s, the uniformed figure jumps up the grassy hill; at 14s, characters run up the stairs towards the tent; at 16s, health hearts decrease to three icons; at 18s, a red-skinned character dances on the platform.
